name: guided-context-ledger
description: Guided Context Ledger (GCL) — the auditable provenance ledger for multi-agent work. Monorepo: protocol spec, starter workspace, @guided-context-ledger/core library, and a local reference connector.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @guided-context-ledger/core && npm run build -w @guided-context-ledger/connector
scripts.test: npm run test -w @guided-context-ledger/core && npm run test -w @guided-context-ledger/connector
